title: Fix broken user registration (username/password)

requirements.text: Investigate and fix the backend Motoko registration logic so that new users can successfully register with a username and password. Ensure the registerUser function correctly stores credentials, returns a success result, and does not throw or return an error under normal registration conditions.

quotes: registration is not working and showing an error
it says [ registration failed. please try again. ]

acceptanceCriteria: A new user can submit a username and password on the registration page without receiving 'Registration failed. Please try again.'
The backend returns a successful response when a valid, non-duplicate username and password are submitted
Duplicate username registration attempts return an appropriate error (not a canister trap)
The owner username 'Akgamer4354' remains blocked from registration

requirements.text: Fix the frontend registration flow in Registration.tsx and the useQueries.ts registration hook so that errors from the backend are correctly caught, surfaced to the user with a meaningful message, and successful registration transitions the user to the login page.

quotes: registration is not working and showing an error
it says [ registration failed. please try again. ]

acceptanceCriteria: Successful registration redirects the user to the login page
Backend error responses (e.g., username already taken) display a specific, readable error message instead of a generic fallback
Network or canister errors are caught and display a user-friendly error message
The registration button is disabled while the request is in-flight to prevent duplicate submissions

constraints: Do not change the owner access control rule — only Akgamer4354 must receive the 'owner' role
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Adding Internet Identity or any third-party authentication method
Changing the login flow for existing users
Modifying the Owner dashboard or maintenance mode features
